languages.text: "Вы были заперты во временной петле в ловушке ксеноса последние пять веков".
"You've been trapped in a time loop by the xenos for the last five centuries."
languages.original_text: "Вы были заперты во временной петле в ловушке ксеноса последние пять веков".

traits.locale_text: "You were trapped in a time loop within the xenos's snare for the last five centuries."
"You were trapped in a time loop within the xenos's snare for the last five centuries."
"You've been trapped in a time loop by the xenos for the last five centuries."
"You've been trapped in a time loop by the xenos for the last five centuries."

languages.text: "Ihr wart die letzten fünf Jahrhunderte in einer Zeitschleife des Xenos gefangen."
languages.original_text: "You've been trapped in a time loop by the xenos for the last five centuries."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr wart die letzten fünf Jahrhunderte in einer Zeitschleife des Xenos gefangen."

languages.text: « Vous avez passé cinq siècles pris au piège d'une boucle temporelle xénos. »
languages.original_text: "You've been trapped in a time loop by the xenos for the last five centuries."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez passé cinq siècles pris au piège d'une boucle temporelle xénos. »

languages.text: «Ha pasado los últimos cinco siglos atrapado en un bucle temporal xenos».
languages.original_text: "You've been trapped in a time loop by the xenos for the last five centuries."

traits.locale_text: «Ha pasado los últimos cinco siglos atrapado en un bucle temporal xenos».

languages.text: "Son beş yüzyıldır zenolar tarafından bir zaman döngüsüne hapsedilmişsin."
languages.original_text: "You've been trapped in a time loop by the xenos for the last five centuries."

traits.locale_text: "Son beş yüzyıldır zenolar tarafından bir zaman döngüsüne hapsedilmişsin."

languages.text: “过去五个世纪里，你一直被困在异形设下的时间循环中。”
languages.original_text: "You've been trapped in a time loop by the xenos for the last five centuries."

traits.locale_text: “过去五个世纪里，你一直被困在异形设下的时间循环中。”

languages.text: 「あなたは、500年もの間、異星人によって時間ループに閉じ込められてきたのです」
languages.original_text: "You've been trapped in a time loop by the xenos for the last five centuries."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは、500年もの間、異星人によって時間ループに閉じ込められてきたのです」
